-- 1. Find all tokens with missing quasi identifiers
delete from appl.ino_control_tokens_w_missing_quasi_id_t;
insert into appl.ino_control_tokens_w_missing_quasi_id_t
(missing_category, token)
select distinct 'Age' as missing_category, b.token
FROM 
    [customer].[stg_ino_control_enrollment_monthly_t] a
    inner join customer.stg_ino_control_tokens_t b
        on a.memberuid = b.memberuid
where a.ageatendyear = ''
union
select distinct 'Gender' as missing_category, b.token
FROM 
    [customer].[stg_ino_control_enrollment_monthly_t] a
    inner join customer.stg_ino_control_tokens_t b
        on a.memberuid = b.memberuid
where a.gendercode in ('', 'U') 
union
select distinct 'Race' as missing_category, b.token
FROM 
    [customer].[stg_ino_control_enrollment_monthly_t] a
    inner join customer.stg_ino_control_tokens_t b
        on a.memberuid = b.memberuid
where a.raceethnicitycode in ('', 'U')
;

delete from appl.ino_treatment_tokens_w_missing_quasi_id_t;

(missing_category, token)
select distinct 'Age' as missing_category, b.token
FROM 
    [customer].[stg_ino_treatment_enrollment_monthly_t] a
    inner join customer.stg_ino_treatment_tokens_t b
        on a.memberuid = b.memberuid
where a.ageatendyear = ''
union
select distinct 'Gender' as missing_category, b.token
FROM 
    [customer].[stg_ino_treatment_enrollment_monthly_t] a
    inner join customer.stg_ino_treatment_tokens_t b
        on a.memberuid = b.memberuid
where a.gendercode in ('', 'U') 
union
select distinct 'Race' as missing_category, b.token
FROM 
    [customer].[stg_ino_treatment_enrollment_monthly_t] a
    inner join customer.stg_ino_treatment_tokens_t b
        on a.memberuid = b.memberuid
where a.raceethnicitycode in ('', 'U')
;

-- remove duplicated tokens from control HEII
delete from [appl].[ino_control_dup_heii_tokens_t];
insert into [appl].[ino_control_dup_heii_tokens_t]
(input_token, min_record_id, count_records)
select input_token, min(record_id) as min_record_id, count(*) as count_records
from [appl].[deid_ino_control_heii_t]
group by input_token
having count(*) > 1;

delete a
from [appl].[deid_ino_control_heii_t] a
	inner join [appl].[ino_control_dup_heii_tokens_t] b
		on a.input_token = b.input_token and a.record_id <> b.min_record_id;
GO

-- redact zip3
update c
set c.zip3 = z.zip3_to
from [appl].[deid_ino_control_heii_t] c
    inner join [dim].[zip3_pop_lt_20k_t] z
        on c.[zip3] = z.zip3_from
;

update c
set c.zip3 = '000'
from [appl].[deid_ino_control_heii_t] c
    left join (select distinct zip3 from [dim].[census_population_by_zip3_age_gender_t]) z
        on c.[zip3] = z.zip3
where 
	c.zip3 not in ('000', '') and z.zip3 is null
;

-- keep age, gender, race only if the claims data does not have them
update c
set c.Age_in_Years = case when m.token is null then '' else a.age_lvl2 end
from [appl].[deid_ino_control_heii_t] c
    left join appl.ino_control_tokens_w_missing_quasi_id_t m
        on c.input_token = m.token and m.missing_category = 'Age'
    left join dim.age_ranges_t a
        on cast(c.Age_in_Years as int) between a.age_lower_bound and a.age_upper_bound
;

update c
set c.Female = case when m.token is null then '' else c.Female end
from [appl].[deid_ino_control_heii_t] c
    left join appl.ino_control_tokens_w_missing_quasi_id_t m
        on c.input_token = m.token and m.missing_category = 'Gender'
;

update c
set c.Probability_Asian = case when m.token is null then '' else c.Probability_Asian end,
    c.Probability_Black = case when m.token is null then '' else c.Probability_Black end,
    c.Probability_Hispanic = case when m.token is null then '' else c.Probability_Hispanic end,
    c.Probability_White = case when m.token is null then '' else c.Probability_White end,
    c.Probability_Other = case when m.token is null then '' else c.Probability_Other end
from [appl].[deid_ino_control_heii_t] c
    left join appl.ino_control_tokens_w_missing_quasi_id_t m
        on c.input_token = m.token and m.missing_category = 'Race'
;

delete from [appl].[deid_ino_treatment_heii_t];

-- remove duplicated tokens from control HEII
delete from [appl].[ino_treatment_dup_heii_tokens_t];
insert into [appl].[ino_treatment_dup_heii_tokens_t]
(input_token, min_record_id, count_records)
select input_token, min(record_id) as min_record_id, count(*) as count_records
from [appl].[deid_ino_treatment_heii_t]
group by input_token
having count(*) > 1;

delete a
from [appl].[deid_ino_treatment_heii_t] a
	inner join [appl].[ino_treatment_dup_heii_tokens_t] b
		on a.input_token = b.input_token and a.record_id <> b.min_record_id;
GO

-- redact zip3
update c
set c.zip3 = z.zip3_to
from [appl].[deid_ino_treatment_heii_t] c
    inner join [dim].[zip3_pop_lt_20k_t] z
        on c.[zip3] = z.zip3_from
;

update c
set c.zip3 = '000'
from [appl].[deid_ino_treatment_heii_t] c
    left join (select distinct zip3 from [dim].[census_population_by_zip3_age_gender_t]) z
        on c.[zip3] = z.zip3
where 
	c.zip3 not in ('000', '') and z.zip3 is null
;

-- keep age, gender, race only if the claims data does not have them
update c
set c.Age_in_Years = case when m.token is null then '' else a.age_lvl2 end
from [appl].[deid_ino_treatment_heii_t] c
    left join appl.ino_treatment_tokens_w_missing_quasi_id_t m
        on c.input_token = m.token and m.missing_category = 'Age'
    left join dim.age_ranges_t a
        on cast(c.Age_in_Years as int) between a.age_lower_bound and a.age_upper_bound
;

update c
set c.Female = case when m.token is null then '' else c.Female end
from [appl].[deid_ino_treatment_heii_t] c
    left join appl.ino_treatment_tokens_w_missing_quasi_id_t m
        on c.input_token = m.token and m.missing_category = 'Gender'
;

update c
set c.Probability_Asian = case when m.token is null then '' else c.Probability_Asian end,
    c.Probability_Black = case when m.token is null then '' else c.Probability_Black end,
    c.Probability_Hispanic = case when m.token is null then '' else c.Probability_Hispanic end,
    c.Probability_White = case when m.token is null then '' else c.Probability_White end,
    c.Probability_Other = case when m.token is null then '' else c.Probability_Other end
from [appl].[deid_ino_treatment_heii_t] c
    left join appl.ino_treatment_tokens_w_missing_quasi_id_t m
        on c.input_token = m.token and m.missing_category = 'Race'
;
